patches.hypothesis: The patch failed to handle non-finite values (NaN, infinite) properly resulting in failure of some tests.
patches.original_hypothesis: The test case is expecting the method to handle non-finite double values even when lenient mode is turned off. The current implementation is throwing an IllegalArgumentException for these values.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method not handling non-finite double values correctly when leniency is enabled. The method should allow non-finite values to be written when leniency is enabled.
